parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.bg_event_type }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload) }}'::jsonb,
  'lexware', 'M6_04a_Lexware_Webhook_Router'
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text;

INSERT INTO lexware_sync_log (sync_direction, entity_type, entity_id, lexware_id, action, sync_status)
VALUES ('pull', '{{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.resource_type }}', NULL,
  '{{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.resource_id }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Callback').item.json.event_type }}', 'received');
